reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
강아지 입맛이 천연껌만 좋아해서 이것저것 많이 도전해봤는데 너무 흥분해서 빨리먹어 본래 원했던 껌기능을 못하거나(그냥 육포간식;;) 2.7kg에 입도작은 아이다보니 두꺼운껌은 못씹거나 토하거나 했었어요 ㅠㅠ 
기존에 바잇미 롤리츄 우피껌이 두께도 딱좋고 제품도 깔끔하고 맘에들어서 구매해서 먹고있던중이라 오래씹는 롱타임 츄잉카우가 나왔다고했를때 너무 두껍지만 않으면 이거...잘먹겠다 싶었는데 진짜 정말로 리얼리 좋아하고 잘먹네요

치아가 워낙 작은아이라 2틀 꼬박씹습니다 ♡
정말 롱타임맞아요!! 

좋은재료로 잘만든껌에 두께도 적당 기호성도 좋아서 이껌두 바잇미에서 계속 사먹이게 될것같아요♡♡♡
reviews.content_en:
My dog only likes natural chews, so I tried many different things, but she gets too excited and eats them too quickly, so they don't really work as a chew (just become a jerky snack;;) Since she's 2.7kg with a small mouth, thick chews she can't chew or they make her gag ㅠㅠ

I was already using BITE ME Lollychew Woofie gum before, and the thickness was just right, the product was clean, and I liked it, so when I heard Long Time Chewing Cow came out, I thought 'as long as it's not too thick, she'll like it...' and she really, truly, genuinely loves it and eats it well!

Since her teeth are really small, she chews on it for a full 2 days ♡
It's really long-lasting!!

It's made with good ingredients, the thickness is just right, and she has a great taste for it, so I think I'll keep buying this gum from BITE ME ♡♡♡

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이갈이 할때부터 우피껌 물에 불려서 계속 먹이고있어요 일반 개껌은 성분도 못믿을 애들이 많고 멍멍리 먹을때도 찐득해져서 손이랑 얼굴에 쉽게 잔여물이 엉기거나 목에 붙어 켁켁거릴때가 많은데 그래도 우피껌은 원물 100퍼에 찐득하게 붙는건 좀 적어서 번거로워도 5-10분씩 물에 불려 주거든요 
그런데 우신껌은?!? 
더 좋네요!! 원물100퍼에 엉키고 켁켁거리지도 않아요! 딱딱한가 싶어 제가 어금니로 씹어봤은데 진짜로 몇번 씹고 침닿으니까 부드러워져요 ㅋㅋㅋ 터키츄처럼ㅋㅋㅋ 우피껌처럼 불려주지 않아도 애기 이빨 부러질 걱정은 적어요!
맛별로 각각 급여해봤는데 기호성 둘다 좋아서 크게 차이없는듯해요 다만 생각보다 한 봉지 안에서 우신껌들끼리 두께 차이가 마니나요! 2배보다 큰것도 있어요 한봉지에 들어간 젤 얇은거 먹이니까 2번 다 딱 10분컷이었구요 두께 두꺼운건 30분은 갈거같아서 주말에 느긋하게 먹여보려구요!! 가격대가 어찌될진 모르겠는데 일단 구매의사 100퍼입니당
reviews.content_en:
I've been soaking woofie gum in water since her teething days and feeding it to her continuously. Most regular dog chews have ingredients I can't trust, and when dogs chew on them, they get sticky and residue easily sticks to their hands and face or gets stuck in their throat causing them to gag. But woofie gum is 100% raw material, so even though it gets a bit sticky, I still soak it in water for 5-10 minutes to be safe.

But Wooshin gum?!?
It's even better!! 100% raw material and it doesn't get sticky or cause gagging! I thought it might be hard so I chewed it with my molars, and honestly after a few chews with saliva it softens right up ㅋㅋㅋ Like Turkey Chew ㅋㅋㅋ You don't need to soak it like woofie gum, so there's less worry about your baby's teeth breaking!

I tried different flavors and the taste preference seems about the same for both, so there's no major difference. But the thickness varies quite a bit between pieces in one bag! Some are more than twice as thick as others. The thinnest piece took exactly 10 minutes both times, and the thicker ones I think will last about 30 minutes, so I'm going to give those on the weekends for a leisurely chew!! I'm not sure what the price point will be, but for now I'm 100% willing to purchase!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
얘 이거 너무 좋아해요…
먹는데 시간이 오래걸리는건 아니지만 
아이가 잠깐이라도 씹으면서 스트레스도 풀고
맛있는거 먹기도 했으면 해서 주문한 건데
평소에 뭐 먹을때 주변에 머리카락있거나 해서 치워줘도
그냥 잠깐 먹던거 물고 정지상태이지 고개들어서 쳐다보진 않거든요..? 근데 저런 표정 처음봤어요….진짜 …그만큼 맛있어서 경계가 엄청나진거겠죠..? 살짝 표정에서 저는 기분나쁘지만ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 맛있다는거니까ㅎㅎㅎ 다먹으면 꿀버전으로 사줘볼까 싶어요!
reviews.content_en:
She loves this so much…
It doesn't take a super long time to eat, but I wanted her to be able to chew for a bit and relieve some stress while enjoying something tasty, so I ordered it.

Usually when she eats something, even if there's hair nearby and I clean it up, she just stops for a moment with it in her mouth and doesn't look up, you know? But I've never seen that expression before…. It must be so delicious that she's really on guard about it, right? ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I'm slightly bothered by the expression lol but it means it's tasty ㅎㅎㅎ When she finishes, maybe I'll try the honey version!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
기존에 있는 껌은 너무 금방 먹어서 두껍고 큰 껌을 사줬더니 또 부담스러운지 잘 안 먹더라구요 
그래서 고민하던 차에 크기도 적당하고 오래 씹는 간식인거 같아서 구매해봤습니다 
첨엔 어색해하더니 곧잘 먹습니다😁
집에서 부분미용하고 받은 스트레스 풀라고 줬는데 좋아해서 다행이네요😍
reviews.content_en:
The existing gum was getting eaten too quickly, so I bought a thicker, bigger one, but she seemed burdened by it and didn't eat it well.

While I was thinking about it, this looked like it was the right size and a long-lasting treat, so I decided to buy it.

She was hesitant at first, but soon got the hang of it 😁

I gave it to her to help her relieve the stress from getting grooming done at home, and I'm glad she likes it 😍

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
이거주면 한시간은 펀안하죠~~^^
다른우신은 먹고나면 입냄새가심한데 바잇미꺼는 좀덜해요^^
reviews.content_en:
If you give her this, she'll be fine for an hour ~~ ^^
Other Wooshin brands give her bad breath after eating, but the BITE ME one is a bit less so ^^

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
불리스틱 유목민인 저희 강아지…😵‍💫
마지막 사진처럼 웬만한 불리스틱은 줘도 거들떠도 안 봐서 진짜 속상했고🚮

롱타임츄잉카우 체험단 되었을때도 사실 안 먹을까봐 걱정을 많이 했는데

정말 신기하게도 롱타임츄잉카우는 엄청 열심히 잘 먹어줘서 감동 받았어요😭
게다가 혼자 얌전히 오래 신나게 먹더라구요😭😭😭❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥

반신반의 하며 체험단 기회로 먹이게 된건데 처음으로 한국에서 하루가 외면하지 않는 불리스틱을 찾게된거라 내돈내산으로 계속 사먹이게 될거같아요!

그리고 하루는 어렸을때 장이 안 좋았던 경험이 있고, 구토도 잦은 편이여서🦴
개껌류를 함부로 먹이지 않는데요 성분도 100% 소우신이라
⭐️오래 먹이고 싶은데 건강에도 나쁘지 않은 간식 주고 싶을때 딱인거같아요!⭐️

드디어 버리지 않아도 되는 불리스틱을 알게 해준 바잇미 에게 감사합니다💓
reviews.content_en:
My dog is a bully stick nomad…😵‍💫
Like in the last photo, no matter what bully stick I give her, she doesn't even glance at it, so I was really upset 🚮

Even when I became a trial reviewer for Long Time Chewing Cow, I was honestly worried she wouldn't eat it.

But amazingly, Long Time Chewing Cow she eats so enthusiastically and well that I was moved to tears 😭

And she chews it alone quietly for a long time excitedly 😭😭😭❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥

I tried it hesitantly through the trial opportunity, and for the first time I found a bully stick that Haru doesn't ignore in Korea, so I'll definitely keep buying it with my own money!

Also, Haru had digestive issues when she was young and tends to vomit often 🦴
So I don't give her dog chews carelessly. The ingredients are 100% beef tendon, so

⭐️It seems perfect for when you want to give a treat for a long time but that's also not bad for her health!⭐️

Thank you BITE ME for finally introducing us to a bully stick we don't have to throw away 💓

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 체험단 당첨되서 먹여보고 리뷰남겨용
오래먹는 우신껌이래서 기대했는데 기대대로에용 아직 아가라 1시간이상 먹어용 ㅋㅋ
자극적인 냄새도없고 바잇미! 역시 믿고 먹입니당
냥이도 같이 키우는데 냥이도 맛나보이는지 근처를 어슬렁 거리네요ㅎㅎ
좋은제품 감사합니다
reviews.content_en:
Got picked for the BITE ME trial and feeding it to test, leaving a review~
I expected a lot since it's a long-lasting woofie gum, and it lived up to expectations~~ Since she's still a baby, she's been eating it for over an hour ㅋㅋ

No harsh smell and BITE ME! I trust and feed it with confidence ㅋ
I also have a cat, and even the cat seems interested since she's been hanging around nearby ㅎㅎ

Thank you for the good product

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
체리가 우신을 이렇게 좋아하는 줄 몰랐네요🤣
그동안 다른 우신들은 그냥 먹는정도? 막 환장하진 않았는데 바잇미 우신은 엄청 좋아해여!
체리는 맛난걸 무조건 침대 가져가서 먹는데 바로 침대 가져가서 야무지게 먹었어요
넘 좋아해서 바로 또 두개 주문완료요👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
I didn't know Cherry loved woofie gum this much 🤣
With other woofie gums, she'd just eat them normally? She wasn't going crazy about them, but BITE ME woofie gum she absolutely loves!

Cherry always takes tasty things to bed to eat, and she took this right to bed and ate it enthusiastically.

She loves it so much I immediately ordered two more 👍🏻

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
우리 막둥이 앙쥬의 이갈이를 위해서 선택했는데 1.7kg의 앙쥬가 잘 먹을수 있을까? 걱정했는데 아주 잘 먹네요.
다른 아이들도 너무 좋아해서 다음에 또 구매해야겠어요.
앙쥬가 잘 먹고 이갈이도 잘하기 바래봅니다.
reviews.content_en:
I chose this for my youngest, Anju's, teething, and I was worried if 1.7kg Anju could eat it well, but she eats it really well.

The other dogs love it too so I'll have to buy it again next time.

I hope Anju continues to eat well and teethes well.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
오래먹는 우신껌 롱타임 츄잉카우
일단 크기가 딱좋은 사이즈
얼마전에 큰사이즈의 우신껌이 좋다고
생각해서 구매했었는데.. 너무크니까
먹다가 지쳐서 남기더라구요.
그래서.난감했었는데, 츄잉카우우신껌
사이즈 딱이네요. 9kg베들링턴테리어
씹어먹는데 30분쯤 걸린것 같아요
작은 강아지 푸들은 하루정도😆
(먹다남긴거 큰강아지가 먹음)
2봉지 먹는데 한참걸릴것같아요
냄새도 안나고 좋습니다
재구매 100프로 입니다
reviews.content_en:
Long-lasting woofie gum Long Time Chewing Cow

First of all, the size is just right.

A while back I bought a large size woofie gum thinking it was good, but it was so big that she got tired of chewing and left some behind.

So I was at a loss, but this Chewing Cow woofie gum size is perfect. For my 9kg Bedlington Terrier it takes about 30 minutes to chew through, and for my smaller Poodle it takes about a day 😆

(The leftover that the small dog didn't finish the bigger dog ate)

It seems like it'll take a while to go through 2 bags.

No smell either, which is nice.

100% will repurchase!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이빨 상할까봐 그동안 우신은 급여 안하고 있었는데
적당히 딱딱해서 앞으로 자주 급여해 줄 것 같아요 
1개 먹는데 30분컷이었어요!
외출시간에 따라서 1개 또는 2개씩 급여량 조절하면 될 것 같아요😊
reviews.content_en: I hadn't been giving Wooshin to my pup because I was worried it might damage their teeth, but this one is just the right amount of firmness, so I think I'll be giving it more often now. One treat lasted about 30 minutes! I can adjust the amount to 1 or 2 depending on how long we'll be out 😊

reviews.name: 희****
reviews.content:
요 강아지는 딱딱한 간식 아그작 아그작 먹는 것을 좋아해요
생각보다 불리스틱 파는 곳이 많지 않거나 품절되는 경우가 잦았는데 드디어 바잇미에도 불리스틱이!
심지어 두 가지 종류라니 선택권이 있어서 너무 좋아요
저는 마누카꿀이 들어간 츄잉카우부터 맛보게 했는데 받자 마자 자기 집 마당에서 열심히 뜯어댑니다ㅎㅎ
입맛도 낼름낼름 다시고 너무 맛있게 먹어서 저도 먹고 싶을 정도랄까,,,?
그리고 유통기한이 넉넉하고 보관도 쉬워요! 물론 저는 금방 먹고 또 사줄 것 같습니다
최근에 오래 먹는 간식 중 맘에 드는 걸 못 찾았는데 바잇미가 찾아줬어요!
reviews.content_en: This pup loves crunchy treats and loves gnawing away at them! It's been hard to find bully sticks in stores and they're often sold out, but finally BITE ME has them too! And there are two different types, so I love having options. I started with the chewing cow with Manuka honey, and as soon as it arrived, my pup was tearing into it in our backyard ㅎㅎ The way they licked their lips and ate it so deliciously makes me want to try it too...? Plus the expiration date is generous and it's easy to store! Of course, I'll probably finish it quickly and buy more. I hadn't found a long-lasting treat I liked recently, but BITE ME found it for me!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
까비가 평소즐겨먹는 우신 !!
5개나 넉넉히들어있는 가성비좋은데 두껍고좋아요
첨가물이 없다는점도 마음에들고 인증까지 받은제품이라
안심하고 먹을수있을것같아요

마누카꿀맛까지있어서오리지날만 먹던
까비에게 좀더 색다른 맛의 즐거움까지
줄수있었어요!!
reviews.content_en: Kabi's favorite - Wooshin!! Great value with 5 generously packed pieces, and they're nice and thick too. I like that there are no additives and the product is certified, so I can feel confident giving it to my pup. Plus there's Manuka honey flavor, so Kabi who only ate the original flavor got to enjoy something new and different!!

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
와아 체험단에 당첨되서 우리 아이가 좋아하는 우신을!!
두가지를 받았는데 마누카꿀부터 먹여보았어요😀
깔끔하게 손질되어 있어서 좋았고 
스몰사이즈라 그런지 그램수나 길이도 짧고 굵기도 얇았는데
5개가 다 똑같진 않고 편차가 있긴 했습니다
자기꺼인거 알고 찜하더니 소중히 잡고 맛있게 냠냠😁
평소에 먹는 우신보다 사이즈가 작아서인지 4~5분컷이네요..
중대형견인 우리 아이에겐 좀 작은 사이즈라 살짝 아쉽지만
조만간 조금 더 길고 굵은 사이즈의 가격대비 훌륭한 우신도 기대해봅니다!!!🤩
reviews.content_en: Wow, I won the trial and got to try Wooshin that our pup loves!! We got two types and tried the Manuka honey first 😀 It was nice that it was cleanly prepared, but since it's small size, the weight and length were shorter and the thickness thinner. The 5 pieces weren't all identical - there was some variation. When my pup realized it was theirs, they held it carefully and ate it so happily 😁 Since it's smaller than what they usually eat, it only lasted 4-5 minutes. It's a bit disappointing that it's too small for our large-breed pup, but I'm looking forward to a longer and thicker size with great value for money coming soon!!! 🤩

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 불리스틱을 자주 구매하는 편인데, 바잇미에서 출시되다니💛 저희 뭉치가 엄청 잘먹고 좋아합니당! 호주 청정우가 입맛에 맞나봐요🤣 그리고 스몰사이즈는 제 기준 조금 짧은 것 같아 미듐이나 라지도 출시되면 재구매해야겠어용!
reviews.content_en: I buy bully sticks often, and BITE ME released them! 💛 Our Mungchi eats them really well and loves them! Australian grass-fed beef must be to their taste 🤣 The small size seems a bit short to me, so if you release medium or large, I'll definitely repurchase!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 체험단으로 당첨되어 우신껌을 받아보았는데, 완전 지금까지 먹여본 불리스틱(우신껌)중 최고로 잘 손질되고 청결해보였어욧! 자세히보니 해썹인증마크가 똬악 있네욤>.< 아들램 우신껌 호다닥 잘근잘근 너모 잘먹는 아이인데, 마누카꿀껌은 더잘먹네욤~ 사이즈 더큰사이즈 나오면 구매버튼 꾸욱 누를께염! 6킬로넘는 아들램에겐 살짝쿵 작아욤~
reviews.content_en: I was selected for the trial and received Wooshin chew, and honestly it was the cleanest and most well-prepared bully stick I've ever given! Looking closely, there's definitely a HACCP certification mark >.< My son is a pup who devours Wooshin chew so quickly and eats it so well, but he eats the Manuka honey chew even more! When a bigger size comes out, I'll definitely click that purchase button! It's a tiny bit small for my 6kg+ son~

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
늘 급하게 안씹고 먹는 우리 강아지 🚰·̫🚰
오래 먹을수 있는 간식을 찾던중 체험단에 당첨되어 
급여했다가 너무 만족한 간식이에요

뼈없는 간식중 오래먹을수 있는건 한정적인데
바잇미에서이렇게 우신 불리스틱이 출시되서 을매나 좋은지
불필요한 첨가물이 없고 국내 핸드메이드 제조라 믿음이 
가더라구요, 게다가 해썹마크까지☺️

그리고 두가지맛으로 나와서 기호에 맞게 급여가 가능하고 
요즘 날씨가 폭염에 태풍까지 난리라 산책못가는날에
요 츄잉카우 하나면 우래기 스트레스 싹 날아갈거같아요>_<

오래먹을수 있어서 여행가서 강아지동반 식당갔을때
하나 슥 주면 편하게 밥먹을수 있을거같아요
reviews.content_en: Our pup who always rushes and doesn't chew 🚰·̫🚰 While looking for long-lasting treats, I won the trial and got a treat we're so satisfied with. Bone-free treats that last long are limited, so it's great that BITE ME released this Wooshin bully stick. There are no unnecessary additives and it's made locally by hand, so I feel confident. Plus it has the HACCP mark ☺️ And since it comes in two flavors, I can choose based on what they like. With crazy hot weather and typhoons these days when we can't go for walks, one of these chewing cows will probably melt away all our pup's stress >_< Since it lasts so long, when we go to dog-friendly restaurants during trips, I can just give one and eat comfortably.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
체험단 당첨! 우신을 워낙 좋아해서 택배상자 뜯을때부터 자기껀줄 기가막히게 알아챈 루키 ㅎㅎ
산책나가서 신나게 먹었어요~~  손바닥 2/3 정도 크기인데 30분동안 열심히 뜯고 씹고 하더라구요, 마지막에 작은 조각이 남아서 오물오물 꿀꺽! ㅎㅎ 덕분에 엄마는 편히 커피를 마실수 있었어요 ❤️ 
체험단 되기전에 내돈내산으로 이미 먹고있었던건 안비밀 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 가성비도 좋고 오래먹는 간식이라 더 좋더라구요~
reviews.content_en: Won the trial! Luki is such a fan of Wooshin that they knew it was theirs the moment we opened the box ㅎㅎ We went for a walk and they ate it happily~~ It's about 2/3 the size of my palm, and they gnawed and chewed on it for 30 minutes, and there was a small piece left at the end that they munched and swallowed! ㅎㅎ Thanks to that, mom could enjoy her coffee peacefully ❤️ It's no secret that I was already buying it myself before becoming a trial member ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Great value for money and since it's a long-lasting treat, it's even better~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
단골고객 체험단으로 귀한 우신껌을 받았어요!

초보언니라 우신에 대해 몰랐고 급여해본적도 없어서, 임자가 잘 먹을지 넘 궁금했거든요. 산책 다녀와서 발 씻기고 보상으로 껌 줬는데 이게 웬일.. 무아지경에 빠진 임자를 처음 봤습니다!! 넘 잘먹네요!!! 처음 먹어보는거라 요령이 없어서인지 1시간 반 동안이나 먹다가 1/3정도 남기고 결국 자기가 포기했습니다. 다음엔 가능하다면 잘라서 줘봐야겠어요.

다른 껌은 넘 빨리 급하게 먹어서 삼키는지 걱정됐는데 이 우신껌은 정말 오래 천천히 먹어서 안심이 됩니다!! 성분도 좋고 치석제거에도 효과적이라니 훌륭하네요!! 기호성 좋아서 다음에도 구매해야겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I received precious Wooshin chew as a regular customer trial member! As a beginner, I didn't know about Wooshin and had never given it before, so I was really curious if my pup would eat it well. After our walk, we washed their paws and gave them the chew as a reward, and wow... this was the first time I saw my pup so absorbed! They ate it so well!!! Since it was their first time and they didn't know the trick, they ate for an hour and a half and left about 1/3 before eventually giving up. Next time, if possible, I'll try cutting it into pieces. With other chews, they eat so quickly and I worried about swallowing, but this Wooshin chew really makes them eat slowly for a long time, so I feel confident!! The ingredients are good and it's effective for tartar removal too, so it's great!! Since they like it so much, I'll buy it again next time.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
체험단 선정으로 롱타임 츄잉카우 먹어보았어요 !
 오만가지 알러지가 있는 누리는 첨가물이 없는 간식만 
먹을수가 있는데 그중 좋아하는 간식이 불리스틱이에요^^
동반 식당이나 동반 카페를 자주가는 누리에게는 필수랍니다

가끔 너무 매끈한 제품은 끝까지 씹지 못하고 
삼켜 토할때가 종종 있는데 츄잉카우는 
굴곡이 적당히 있어서 씹기 좋았는지 
삼키지않고 잘 먹어주었답니다. 

가족들 밥먹는 시간동안 유모차에 들어가 잘 먹어서 
또 구매할 예정이에요 ^^
reviews.content_en: I was selected for the trial and tried the long-lasting chewing cow! Nuri has tons of allergies and can only eat treats without additives, and bully sticks are one of their favorites ^^ For Nuri who goes to dog-friendly restaurants and cafes often, it's essential. Sometimes with very smooth products, they don't chew all the way and swallow and vomit, but the chewing cow had just the right amount of texture so they chewed it well instead of swallowing it. During family dinner time, they stayed in their stroller eating it well, so I'm planning to buy it again ^^

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
한팩에 5개씩 들어있는 구성이라~ 가성비 좋음!
일단 꺼내면 계속 점프해서 달라고하는정도... ㅎㅎㅎ 먹을때는 아주 무아지경 뺏길까봐 잡아주려해도 도망가서 먹어요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 한번에 먹기 딱 좋은 사이즈에요~ 30분정도면 다먹더라구요 ㅎㅎ 냄새도 안나고 손질도 깨끗하게
되었는 믿을 수 있는 제품인것같아요!  >_<
reviews.content_en: Great value for money since it comes with 5 pieces per pack! 🐕 Once you take it out, they keep jumping and asking for more... haha The way they eat it is just pure bliss - even when I try to hold it so it doesn't get stolen, they run away to eat it hahaha It's the perfect size to eat in one go~ They finish it in about 30 minutes hehe No smell and super clean - it's a reliable product you can trust! >_<

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
소우신껌 안좋아하는 친구 없을 것 같아요
나의 사랑 너의 사랑 불리스틱🫶🏻

바잇미 롱타임 츄잉카우의 체크뽀인뜌🪄✨️
-오~래 먹을 수 있는 간식
-호주에서 자라난 청정우🐂
-2가지맛(마누카꿀/오리지널)
-믿을 수 있는 국내 핸드메이드:)
-불필요한 첨가물 놉!!

소우신의 경우 1개씩 포장되있는 제품이 많은데 요건 한봉지에 5개씩 들어있어서 1봉지만 사도 마음이 아주 든든(?)하답니당😄

솔직한리뷰👉🏻 칸쵸는 평소에 기본 불리스틱은 즐겨먹다보니, 처음본 마누카꿀맛으로 급여해봤는데 10분컷이엇어요...ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 칸쵸한텐 오~~래 먹는 간식이 아니엿다는... 1개로는 부족한 뜐뜌니 울 댕댕이한텐 5개입 바잇미 츄잉카우가 딱!!🐶🩷
reviews.content_en: I don't think there's a single dog that dislikes beef chews 🫶🏻 My love, your love, bullysticks~ BITE ME Long Time Chewing Cow Checklist 🪄✨ -Snack you can chew for a long time -Clean beef raised in Australia🐂 -2 flavors (Manuka Honey/Original) -Trustworthy domestic handmade :) -No unnecessary additives!! With beef chews, most products come individually wrapped, but this one has 5 in one package so even buying just one bag feels super reassuring(?) 😄 Honest review👉🏻 Kancho usually enjoys regular bullysticks, so I gave her the Manuka honey flavor for the first time, but it only lasted 10 minutes...ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ So it's not a long-lasting treat for Kancho... One isn't enough, so the 5-pack BITE ME Chewing Cow is just perfect for my pup!! 🐶🩷

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
체험단에 당첨되어 먹여볼 수 있게 되었습니다 ㅎㅎ
저희 강아지는 27키로 사모예드 만 10세 아이인데요

평소에 위장이 약해서 딱딱한간식, 개껌 종류를 애는 좋아하는데 먹고 설사나 구토 하는 경우가 종종 있어서 조심히 먹이는 편인데 요 불리스틱은 부담없이 먹일 수 있을것 같아요 ㅎ
잘먹어주고 먹이고 나서 토도 안해서 만족합니다

소형견에게 적합한 크기 같은데요
대형견 아이에게는 작은 크기지만 그래서 소화기에 큰 부담 없을거 같아서 좋았습니다 ㅎㅎ
저희아이 같은 이빨 및 소화기가 약한 노견 대형견에게도 부담없이 먹이기 좋은것 같습니다☺️
reviews.content_en: I got selected for the trial event and got to try it! 😊 My dog is a 27kg Samoyed who just turned 10 years old. Usually my dog's stomach is sensitive, so while he likes hard treats and dog chews, he often gets diarrhea or vomits after eating, so I'm careful about what I give him. But I think I can give him this bullystick without worry 😊 He ate it well and didn't throw up after, so I'm satisfied! It seems like a size suitable for small dogs, but since it's a smaller size even for my large dog, it shouldn't put much strain on his digestion, which is great! It seems like a good option for senior large dogs like mine with weak teeth and digestion ☺️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 체험단이벤트로 당첨되서 한번먹여봤는데 진짜좋아요!!저희집아이가 입맛이 진짜로까다롭고 불리스틱도 다먹는게 드물고 집안에 굴러다녔는데 요제품은 첨에 겉에 핥더니만 맛있었는지 각잡고 오독오독 야금냐금 씹어서 먹는데 너무좋네요ㅎㅎ 속안까지 바짝 건조되서 혼자만의 시간이 필요하신다면 요제품추전해여 저희집아이는요거하나 다먹는데 25분정도걸렸어요!! 저희집아가가 6.5kg중소형견인데 너무좋네요!!
reviews.content_en: I won the trial event and gave it to my dog once and it's really great!! My dog has really picky taste and rarely finishes bullysticks - they usually just roll around the house, but with this product, after licking the outside at first, once they tasted how delicious it is, they started crunching and chewing it bit by bit so happily!! It's thoroughly dried inside, so if you need some alone time, I recommend this product. My dog takes about 25 minutes to finish one!! My dog is a 6.5kg small to medium-sized dog and loves it!! 😊

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 딱딱한 원물간식을 좋아하는 윌리에게 안전한 먹을거리가 하나 더 생겼어요! 직접 꺼내 꼼꼼히 살펴보니 너무도 깔끔하고 깨끗하고 맛있어보여요. 우피, 저키 등 첨가물 많은 식품은 거르고 있는데 츄잉카우는 첨가물 없는 100%원물이라는 것이 가장 마음에 들어요! 입이 크고 워낙에 잘먹는 편이라 금세 하나 뚝딱 해버리던데 중/대형견용으로 어서 빨리 출시되기를 기대합니다~
reviews.content_en: Willie who loves hard natural treats now has one more safe food option! I took it out and examined it carefully and it looks so clean, neat, and delicious. I avoid foods with lots of additives like rawhide and jerky, but what I love most about Chewing Cow is that it's 100% pure natural ingredient with no additives! Since Willie has a big mouth and eats really well, he finishes one quickly, but I'm looking forward to the medium/large dog version coming out soon~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
체험단 당첨으로 롱타임 츄잉카우 먹어봤어요😋
운동장에서 뛰뛰하고 먹으니 더 맛있는지 야무지게 먹더라구요:)
소 우신 손질하시면 다 아실 꺼에요…손질하기 어렵고 정성도 엄청 들어가요ㅜ 
바잇미 츄잉카우는 첨가물 없이 깨끗한 원물로 제조한다고 하니 믿고 먹일 수 있어요!! 다 먹으면 재구매 할꺼에요 추천합니다👍🏻
reviews.content_en: I won the trial event and tried the Long Time Chewing Cow 😋 After running around at the playground and eating it, he seemed to enjoy it even more and ate it eagerly :) Everyone who handles beef chews knows... it's difficult to prepare and takes so much effort ㅜ BITE ME Chewing Cow is made with clean natural ingredients without additives, so I can trust and feed it with confidence!! I'll repurchase once it's finished. I recommend it! 👍🏻

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
신제품 올라오자마자 구매했던 츄잉 카우껌!!!!
지금도 저희 집 라이스가 제일 최애인 불리스틱이에요🤍
오래 섭취도 가능하고 스트레스도 풀고! 
두 가지맛으로 선택해서 구매할 수도 있어서 좋아요
겉표면이 평평해서 이빨이 다칠 우려도 적어서 좋아요!
믿을 수 있는 재료로도 사용해서 앞으로도 자주 재구매할 예정이에요!
츄잉카우껌만 주면 신나서 팔짝팔짝 뛰는 모습때문에 안 줄수기 없는 마성의 매력껌,,💛
reviews.content_en: I bought the Chewing Cow chew as soon as the new product came out!!!! It's still my Rice's favorite bullystick in our house 🤍 You can chew for a long time and it relieves stress too! It's great that you can choose and buy two different flavors. The flat surface is good because there's less worry about damaging teeth! Made with trustworthy ingredients so I plan to repurchase often! When I give just the Chewing Cow chew, he jumps around excitedly, so I can't help but give it to him - it's such an irresistibly charming chew 💛

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 체험단으로 오래씹는 우신껌 처음 먹여봤어요! 11개월된 코카(14.n키로)이고 다른 껌이나 뼈간식같은걸 금방 먹어버리는편이에요. 그래도 이건 다먹는데 10분 이상은 걸리는거 같아요!! 워낙 씹는힘이 좋아서 엄청 오랫동안 먹는편은 아니여도 오래먹을수 있는 간식인거 같아요! 두가지맛 모두 줘봤는데 둘다 아주 잘먹습니다!! 다음에도 구매할것 같아요
reviews.content_en: I tried the long-chewing beef chew for the first time with the trial event! It's a Cocker Spaniel who just turned 11 months old (14.n kg) and usually finishes other chews or bone treats quickly. Even so, this one takes at least 10 minutes or more to finish!! Even though he has really strong jaws and isn't someone who chews for super long, it seems like a long-lasting treat! I gave him both flavors and he ate both really well!! I think I'll buy it next time too

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
이번에 베네본 껌 사자마자 체험단에 당첨 됫는데
베네본 보다 이걸 더 맛있게 먹는거 같아요!! 
저희 춘식인 개껌 매니아긴 한데 맛 없거나 흥미 떨어지면 안먹는 아인데 이거 진짜 이렇게 집중해서 먹는거 보는거 진짜 오랫만 이에요!!!
길이가 숏이라 한개 먹는데 한 십분정도 걸리는거 같아요!!
롱 길이도 만들어 주세요!! 롱으로 나오면 쟁여두고 먹일거 같아요><
기호성은 진짜 최고 입니다!! ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I just bought Benebone chew and won the trial event, but my dog seems to like this one even more!! My Chun-sik is a chew enthusiast, but if it doesn't taste good or isn't interesting, he won't eat it. Seeing him concentrate this much on eating something is really something I haven't seen in a while!!! It takes about 10 minutes to finish one since it's short length!! Please make a long version too! Once it comes in long length, I'll stock up and give it to him ><. The palatability is really the best!! ㅋ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
야호 장구니가 너무 좋아하는 바잇미 우신!!! 
체험단 되기전에 우신 나오지마자 두가지맛 주문해서 너무 잘 먹고 있었는데 
체험단 있길래 바로 신청 했어요 👀
요 우신은 치석 제거용으로 아주 좋고 🦷✨
오래 먹어서 어디 나갈때 하나 주고 나오면
집에서 아주 조용하게 잘 있답니다 😆ㅋㅋ
바잇미 우신 최고야~!!

 📢 바잇미 우신 안먹어본 친구 없게 해주세요 🤗
reviews.content_en: Yay! Jang-goo-ni loves BITE ME beef chew so much!!! Before I became a trial tester, I ordered both flavors as soon as the beef chew came out and he's eating it really well, so I applied right away 👀 This beef chew is really great for tartar removal 🦷✨ Since he chews for a long time, if I give him one before going out, he stays super quiet at home 😆ㅋㅋ BITE ME beef chew is the best~!! 📢 Let's make sure no dog hasn't tried BITE ME beef chew 🤗

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
단골고객 혜택으로 체험단에 당첨이 되어 작성합니다! 우선 저는 간식을 살 때, 꼭 제조국을 먼저 보고, HACCP 인증마크가 있는지 확인을 하는데,  2가지가 충족이 되어 바로 신청했어요!
저희 삼둥이들은 분리불안이 있어서, 나올 때 오래 씹는 간식 던져주고 나오는데, 딱 좋아요!!
이가 작다보니깐 하루종일 씹네요 ! 중량에 맞추려고 크기도 다양하게 들어있어서 아이들 사이즈에 맞게 주고 나왔네요~ 앞으로도 아이들을 위한 좋은 간식 만들어주세요! :)
reviews.content_en: I'm writing this as a test product winner through loyal customer benefits! First, when I buy treats, I always check the country of origin and look for the HACCP certification mark, and since both were satisfied, I applied right away! My triplets have separation anxiety, so I throw them a treat that takes a long time to chew before I leave, and it's perfect!! Since they have small teeth, they chew on it all day long! The sizes are varied to match the weight, so I was able to give them treats that fit each of my pups' sizes~ Please keep making good treats for our kids in the future! :)

reviews.content:
오래먹는 간식중에 기호성좋고 급여하기 편하고 
위생적인 간식이 뭐가 있을까?! 하다가 
체험해본 츄잉 카우! 
성분도 중요하지만 기호성도 중요한 탄탕이들 !
집안일할때나 어디 외출할때 주기 딱좋은 크기에 
급하게 먹는 아이들은 푸드클립에 끼워주기 좋은 크기에요!
reviews.content_en: I was wondering what long-lasting treat has good palatability, is easy to give, and is hygienic?! So I tried CHEWING COW! For my pups, ingredients are important but palatability is just as important! It's the perfect size to give them when I'm doing housework or going out, and it's a size that's great to clip into a food clip for pups that eat too quickly!

reviews.name: R****
reviews.content:
다견가정에서 정말 이만한 껌 없을것 같아요.
말랑한 껌은 정말 순삭이라 오래 먹일 껌을 찾고 있었는데 드디어 찾았네요. 오숑이랑 오숑엄마 껌봉투 꺼내자마자 몰려들었네요 ㅎㅎ
기호성도 정말 최고고 맛있게 질겅질겅 씹고 제법 오래 씹네요
참고로 4 개월차비숑이들이랑 4 년차 비숑엄마가 씹었어요!!
담에도 재구매 들어갑니다~
reviews.content_en: For a multi-dog household, I don't think there's a better chew out there. Soft chews get devoured instantly, so I was looking for a chew that lasts longer, and I finally found it. As soon as Osong and Osong's mom pulled out the chew bag, they came running 😄 The palatability is really the best and they chew on it so deliciously for quite a while. For reference, this was chewed by 4-month-old Bichons and a 4-year-old Bichon mom!! I'll definitely be reordering next time~

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
[체험단용] 바잇미 
오래먹는 우신껌 롱타임 츄잉카우 2종
바잇미 런칭후 초창기 멤버
그동안 단 한번도 이벤트 행사에 당첨 한번 안되었었는데
당첨이 되었네요!
저처럼SNS를 안하는 사람을 배려해서
만들어주신 행사같네요!
또 이벤트 행사또한
제가 많이 그토록 찾던 간식이네요
아이들이 정말 오래먹어요
시간 쟤보니 5분? 이것도 긴거예요!
다른간식은 1~2 분이면  끝인데
바잇미 앞으로도
SNS  안하는 사람이 있으니.?
이런 행사 많이 부탁드려요!
그리고 너무 맘에드는 행사 이벤트
너무 감사합니다.
그리고 저 당첨 되도록 자주 자주 부탁드립니다.
reviews.content_en: [Test Product] BITE ME Long-lasting Chewing Cow 2 types I've been a member since the early days after BITE ME's launch. I've never won any events or giveaways until now. This event seems to have been made with people like me in mind who don't use SNS! And this event is exactly the kind of treat I've been looking for! My pups really chew on it for a long time. When I checked the time, 5 minutes? That's already long! Other treats are done in 1-2 minutes, but BITE ME, for the future, since there are people who don't use SNS, please do more events like this! And I'm so grateful for this wonderful event! And please keep selecting me for giveaways again and again.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
뼈 간식을 안 주고 불리스틱을 주는데 애들이 너무 좋아해요.
엄청 빨리 먹는 강아지들인데 이 제품은 좀 오래먹더라구요.
진짜 이름처럼 롱타임 👀 강아지가 많아서 하나 사면 너무 금방 먹어서 또 구매할 예정입니다 ! 바잇미에서 불리스틱 나와서 너무 좋아요 ㅠㅠ 다양한 사이즈랑 두께로 나왔으면 좋겠어요 !!!
reviews.content_en: I give my dogs bully sticks instead of bone treats, and they absolutely love them. My dogs normally eat super fast, but they actually chew on this product for a while. It really lives up to its name - Long Time 👀 Since I have multiple dogs and one gets finished too quickly, I'm planning to buy more! I'm so happy that BITE ME came out with bully sticks ㅠㅠ I wish they came in various sizes and thicknesses!!!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
체험단 당첨되어 작성하는 솔직한 후기입니다! 
이제 21개월 된 뭐든 씹고 보는 개춘기멍멍이라 오~래 먹는 간식만 찾아서 먹이곤 하는데 수제가 아닌 이상 국내에서 만든 간식을 찾기 힘들더라구요- 기왕 먹이는거 좋은거 찾아 먹이고픈 댕엄마들 취향저격일거같아요〰️ 물론 댕댕이 입맛엔 더 취향저격인듯 합니다:) 하나 다 먹고는 또 먹고싶은지 한번도 떼 안부린 애가 간식 긁으면서 낑낑거리길래 정말 진심으로 놀랐어요,, 다 먹이기전에 내돈내산으로 실컷 먹일것같아요💗 좋은 제품 감사합니다🫶🏻❤️
reviews.content_en: This is an honest review written as a test product winner! My pup just turned 21 months old and is in the chewing phase where he chews on everything, so I only feed him long-lasting treats. It's hard to find treats made domestically in Korea unless they're homemade- I think this would be a hit for dog moms who want to feed their pups quality treats 〰️ And it seems to be even more of a hit for the pup's taste 😊 After finishing one, when he whined and scratched at the treat bag wanting more without complaining once, I was truly shocked,, I think I'll end up buying more with my own money before I finish feeding him what I have 💗 Thank you for the great product 🫶🏻❤️

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
처음으로 당첨된 체험단 !! 
꾸마가 딱딱한 간식이 없어서 이번에 한번 먹여보저 해서 신청했습니당 
잘 먹을까 걱정이 됬는데 괜한걱정이였더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
처음에 좀 낯설어 해서 집에있는 치약을 조금 뭍혀줬더니 금세 잘먹었습니다 !!
그리고 간식을 좀 급하게 먹어서 목에 걸릴까봐 딱딱한 간식은 급여를 안한것돞있는데 츄잉카우는 비교적 오래먹어서 대 만족했습니다 !
reviews.content_en: My first time winning a test product!! Kooma didn't have hard treats, so I applied wanting to try this once. I was worried if he'd eat it, but that worry was unnecessary 😂 At first he was a bit hesitant, so I put a little toothpaste on it from home, and he ate it right away!! And since my pup tends to eat treats too quickly and I was worried about choking, I haven't given him hard treats, but Chewing Cow lasts relatively long so I was very satisfied!

reviews.name: 화****
reviews.content:
헤헤 바잇미 오래먹는 우신껌 체험한 당첨되어서 
내가 친구들한테 우신 쐈당~

칭구들이랑 수영한판 하고 맛있게 우신껌 냠냠먹었습니당
윌리가 원래 우신을 안먹거든요!?
근데 마누카꿀이 첨가되어서 그런가 진짜 맛있게 먹어서 또 줬네요 
윌리뿐만 아니라 비비도 밥풀이도 정신 못차리고 냠냠 먹었어요! 
특히 밥풀이는 빗질하는데 먹느라 정신없어서 빗질도 얌전히 잘 받았어요 

애기들 간식 먹이고 좀 쉬고 싶으신 분들 우신껌을 주세여 
아주 잠시 평화롭답니다!
reviews.content_en: Hehe, I won the test product for BITE ME's long-lasting chew gum! So I bragged to my friends about how Ushin is so good~ After swimming with friends, I had delicious Ushin chew gum 😋 Willie originally doesn't eat Ushin treats!? But maybe because Manuka honey is added, he ate it so deliciously I gave it to him again! Not just Willie, but Bibi and Babpuli also forgot everything and ate it happily! Especially Babpuli was so focused on eating during brushing time that he stayed still nicely for it! If you want to take a breather after feeding your pups treats, give them Ushin chew gum. You'll have a moment of peace!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
체험단으로 선정되어 우신껌 두가지맛 받아보게되었어요!!
예전에 간식 어떤거 생겼으면하는지 질문에서 바잇미에서 우신이랑 터키츄 만들어주면 좋겠다 햇엇는데 나왔다니 너무 즇아요 !!! 저희애기는 5.8kg이고  보통 간식 1분컷 좀 오래먹는건 5-10분컷인데 이건 좀 굵은거는 30분이상 얇은거도 20분정도는 먹는거같아요 !!! 
간식먹기 전/후 확실한 우래기 표정…^^ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
좋은 기회주셔서 감사해용 다먹으면 직접 재구매도 할예정이에용 나중에 터키츄도 만들어주세요>.<
reviews.content_en: I was selected as a test product reviewer and received two flavors of Ushin chew gum!! Previously I mentioned in a survey what kind of treats I wished existed, and BITE ME made Ushin and Turkey chew! I'm so excited!!! My pup weighs 5.8kg and usually finishes treats in 1 minute, longer-lasting ones last 5-10 minutes, but the thicker ones seem to last over 30 minutes and the thinner ones about 20 minutes!!! The difference in my pup's expression before and after eating the treat is clear…😂 Thank you for the great opportunity! I plan to repurchase when we run out! Please make Turkey chew in the future too>.<

reviews.name: 금****
reviews.content:
짱아는 오~~래 씹는 껌 필수여서 우드스틱을 항상 급여했어요.
그래서 이번 바잇미 체험단에 참가하게 되었어요!!
이번에 슬개골 수술 하면서 스켈링도 같이 하였는데 어금니가 깨져있다고 하더라구요. 너무나 놀라고 속상한 마음에 
바로 우드스틱 버리고 
바잇미에서 새로 출시한 츄잉카우로 선택했어요! 
오~래먹는것도 물론 기호성도 최고👍🏼 
심지어 오리지널과 마누카꿀 두가지 맛 이라 더 선택적이여서 좋아요🫣🫶🏻 바잇미최고! 🩷
reviews.content_en: Jjang-ah absolutely needs a long-lasting chew, so I always gave him wood sticks. So I decided to participate in the BITE ME test product program!! During this sloped kneecap surgery, I also got scaling done, and the vet said my back molars were cracked. I was so shocked and upset that I threw away the wood sticks right away and chose the newly launched Chewing Cow from BITE ME! It lasts a really long time and the palatability is the best👍🏼 Plus, with two flavors - original and Manuka honey - it's even better to have options 🫣🫶🏻 BITE ME is the best! 🩷

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이갈이 중인 6갤 아기 앙꾸에요 매끈매끈한 우신껌이 품질 좋은 우신껌으로 알고있는데 츄잉카우 우신껌은 진짜 울퉁한 부분없이 매끈하고 크기도 적당해요! 
너무 좋아하고 잘먹어요 우신껌 먹규 유치 흔들리기시작해서 너무 좋아요>_<
reviews.content_en: My 6-month-old baby Angku is teething, and I know smooth chews are good quality, but CHEWING COW chews are really smooth without any rough spots and the size is just right! My pup loves it and eats so well. After eating the chew, her baby teeth started to wiggle - I'm so happy about that >_<

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
오래먹는 간식으로 우신을 많이 줬었는데 겨울이가 금방 질려서 안 먹었는데 롱타임 츄잉카우는 끝까지 너무 열심히 먹어줘서 또 구매할 거 같아요!! 아 크기도 너무 적당하답니당
강추‼️‼️
reviews.content_en: I used to give a lot of regular chews as long-lasting treats, but Gyeowul got bored quickly and wouldn't eat them. LONG TIME CHEWING COW though - she chews it so hard all the way to the end, so I think I'll be ordering again!! And the size is just perfect too 💪 Highly recommend‼️‼️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
다른 오래 먹을수있는 간식은.. 줘도 맨날 5분컷..

근데 이거는..!!! 그래도 10~15분정도 먹더라구요👏🏻💛

맨날 엄마 집나가면 문 앞에서 울기만 했던 애기지만
츄잉카우에 집중을 해서 그런지 조금 우는 시간이 짧아진거같아서 너무 좋아요🐶🩵
reviews.content_en:
Other long-lasting treats I give her... she only chews for like 5 minutes max.

But this one...!!! She actually chews for about 10-15 minutes 👏🏻💛

My baby used to just cry at the door whenever mom left the house, but now she focuses so much on CHEWING COW that her crying time has gotten shorter - I'm so happy about that 🐶🩵

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우리 댕댕이 택배 오자마자 자기껀줄 딱 알고 대기하더하구요
이제껏 먹은 것 중에 가장 오래 먹은 것 같아요
왠만한건 일분내로 순삭하는데 오분동안 먹은거 같아요
기호성도 좋고 아주 맛있게 냠냠 했답니다
다 다음에 또 계속해서 구매할 것 같아요
카페에서 맛있게 냠냠 했답니다
reviews.content_en:
My pup knew it was her treat as soon as the package arrived and waited for it right away 📦
Out of everything she's eaten, this seems to be the one she chews the longest!
She usually gulps down most things in under a minute, but this one she chewed for about 5 minutes.
She has great taste for it and was munching away so deliciously 😋
I think I'll keep buying this from now on!
Even at the cafe she munched on it so happily 🐶

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 오래 먹는 간식이란 간식은 눈에 보일 때마다 사본 것 같은데 '진짜' 오래 먹는 간식은 이 우신껌이 처음입니다.🥹 덕분에 조용한 식사시간을 보내고 있어요. 한 번 먹기 시작하면 못해도 30분 ~ 1시간 가까이 조용히 씹고 있더라고요. 기호성도 좋아 고기 냄새라면 정신을 못차리던 애가 앞에서 고기에 눈길도 주지 않고 간식만 씹고 있습니다😆 가격대가 좀 있어서 고민했었는데 너무너무 만족스러워요!!
reviews.content_en: I feel like I've bought every long-lasting treat out there whenever I saw one, but this is truly the FIRST treat that actually lasts long 🥹 Thanks to it, we're having quiet meal times now. Once she starts chewing, she'll quietly chew for a good 30 minutes to almost an hour. Her interest in treats is so good that even a pup who loses her mind over the smell of meat doesn't even glance at meat in front of her and just keeps chewing on this treat 😆 I was hesitant because of the price, but I'm sooo satisfied!!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
잘 먹는 츄잉카우🫶🏻
중형견 이상부터는 다소 작은감이 있지만
소형견 아이들에겐 부담없는 사이즈로 좋을것 같아요

저희 애기는 가끔 기분 전환을 위해서 불리스틱을 사주는데
너무 딱딱하거나 오래 먹어서 이빨에 문제 생길까 걱정도 하는데요
요건 부담없어서 좋네요
reviews.content_en:
CHEWING COW - she eats it well 🫶🏻
For medium-sized dogs and larger, the size might feel a bit small,
but for small dogs it seems like a good, manageable size!

My baby sometimes gets a bully stick for a change of pace, but I worry it's too hard or lasts too long and might cause dental problems.
This one is worry-free which is nice!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
나 점보퓰 견생 최초로 체험단이라는 거시 돼따.. 아프다 보니 별 일이 다 있균.. 심지어 내가 젤 조아하눈 소우신이다!!!!ㅎ호호하항항
아 누나도 참,, 리뷰 쓸거면 멀카락듀 좀 빗어주구 기름칠도 좀 해쥬지 체면 안산다🫨
일단 롱타임 츄잉 카우 껌은 두가지 맛이 있다 오리지날과 울 누나는 먹어본 적도 없는 마누카누뀰 맛. 굳이 종류는 알 필요 없따 왜냐면 그냥 둘다 댕존맛이기 때뮤니다. 
하지만 나 점보퓰 뚠뚠이에게 롱타임은 아니어따..3분만에 끝이 나따능 따핫!>_< 부끄럽다.
그래도 간식 중에는 젤 오래 씨버머것다
비오는 날 밖에도 못 나가고 적적하고 기분이 멜랑꼴리 거시기할 때 하나 질겅질겅 씹어주믄 기분이 나아질 것 같다
 이렇게 작성하는 것 맞는지 모르게따~ 다음에는 체험단 안시켜쥴거가따🥹
#바잇미 #롱타임츄잉카우 #바잇미간식 #우신껌 #불리스틱 #강아지간식 #댕존맛
reviews.content_en:
So this is my first time ever being a product tester in my whole Jumbo Pul life... I got sick so all sorts of things happened.. And it's my favorite CHEWING COW!!!!! Hehe haha
Oh my sister too, if you're gonna write a review at least brush my hair a bit and oil it too, it's embarrassing 🫨
Anyway, LONG TIME CHEWING COW comes in two flavors - original and Manuka honey flavor that my sister has never even tried. You don't really need to know the types though, because honestly both taste like dog-approved deliciousness.
But for me, the jumbo pul tum-tum, LONG TIME isn't really long... it's done in 3 minutes 😭>_< Embarrassing.
But it's still the longest-lasting treat compared to other snacks!
On rainy days when I can't go outside and feel bored and melancholic, chewing on one of these makes me feel better 🐶
I'm not sure if I'm writing this right~ Next time I won't do product testing 🥹
#BITEME #LONGTIMECHEWINGCOW #BITEMEtreats #chewing #bullystick #dogtreats #dogapproved

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 넘 잘 먹어요 오래 먹일 수 있어서 좋아요 :-)
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and my pup eats it so well! It's great that she can chew it for a long time :-)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이갈이 시기의 댕댕이들에게 격하게 추천합니다!
우드스틱은 쳐다도 안보고 타사제품 불리스틱두 먹는둥 마는둥 했었는데 이건 정말 잘 먹어요!
다먹으면 또 주문해야겠어요~^^
reviews.content_en:
I highly recommend this to dogs going through teething!
She didn't even look at wood sticks and barely touched other brands' bully sticks, but she really eats this one! Once she finishes it, I'll have to order again ~^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 오리지널만 먹여봤는데 아주 좋아해요. 혼자 호다닥 가져가서 먹네여. 사이즈가 조금씩 다른데 큰거는 꽤 오래먹는 편이에요. 나중에는 먹다가 포기하기도 했어요.
reviews.content_en: I've only tried the original and she loves it so much. She grabs it and runs off to eat it by herself. The sizes vary a bit, and the bigger ones last quite a while to chew. Eventually she gave up on finishing it though.
